issue_title: Lines containing ":"s are apt to be coloured incorrectly
issue_body_preview:
In the  editor:
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a3da5c5e-4ba4-4e06-9e2f-7a0b01fbd0e2)
but
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/dab40a83-b060-4333-8181-6f948e0e874b)

This appears to be an artifact of Ride 4.6 - I get the same outcome when I am connected to either 2
test_description_zh: 在编辑器中输入包含冒号':'的代码行，观察语法高亮/代码着色是否正确显示。例如输入包含标签定义（label:）或键值对等含冒号的语句，检查各 token 的颜色是否与预期的语法类别一致。
expected_result_zh: 包含冒号的代码行应正确进行语法着色，各个 token（关键字、标签、变量、字符串等）的颜色应与其语法类别匹配，不会出现整行或部分内容颜色错误的情况。
